title: Where RPs Fail MHRA Inspection
alt: Five common GDP Responsible Person inspection failures

items.label: Absent or part-time RP
items.desc: Named on the licence but disengaged from daily oversight

items.label: Weak bona fides checks
items.desc: Sourcing or supplying without verifying authorisation

items.label: Poor temperature control
items.desc: Unmapped storage, uncalibrated monitoring, reflex disposal

items.label: Broken record integrity
items.desc: Traceability gaps and unexplained edits to records

items.label: Loose returns & recalls
items.desc: Returned stock resold without storage assessment
